title: Better Boss Bar
description: A texture pack to make boss bar more special
body:
This is an interesting texture pack, it has changed a lot of boss health bars, and the author is working on adding more boss health bars (part of the update was decided by my vote on domestic social networking sites).

This material pack's texture is made by me independently. You can't borrow the texture without my permission，Special thanks to: naku。

Currently completed:
- Twilight Forest（Not all done）
- cataclysm：ignis，ender_guardian(Not loaded）
- vanlia:wither，enderdragon
- alex's mobs
- mowzie's mobs
- Fish's Undead Rising
- whisperwoods
- stalwart-dungeons
- meetyourfight

[Thanks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/enhanced-boss-bars/comments)
This resource pack uses a "wheel" from Enhanced Boss Bars, licensed to me by the author in the gallery.
curseforge:https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-boss-bar
